locked."},"StakeClaimReleased(address,bytes32,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a stake claim is released and stake is unlocked."},"StakeClaimsReleased(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a series of stake claims are released."},"ThawingPeriodRangeSet(uint64,uint64)":{"notice":"Emitted when the thawing period range is set."},"VerifierCutRangeSet(uint32,uint32)":{"notice":"Emitted when the verifier cut range is set."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"DEFAULT_MIN_PROVISION()":{"notice":"Default minimum GRT provision per chain. Lower than SubgraphService (100k) \u2014 RPC proxying has lower infrastructure complexity (no Graph Node, no subgraph compilation)."},"MIN_THAWING_PERIOD()":{"notice":"Minimum thawing period. Shorter than SubgraphService (28d) because RPC correctness disputes resolve faster than subgraph POI verification."},"STAKE_TO_FEES_RATIO()":{"notice":"Stake locked per GRT of fees collected. Matches SubgraphService."},"acceptProvisionPendingParameters(address,bytes)":{"notice":"Accept pending changes to this provider's provision parameters."},"addChain(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Add a chain to the supported set."},"claims(bytes32)":{"notice":"List of all locked stake claims to be released to service providers"},"claimsLists(address)":{"notice":"Service providers registered in the data service"},"collect(address,uint8,bytes)":{"notice":"Collect fees by submitting a signed Receipt Aggregate Voucher (RAV). Flow:   RPCDataService.collect() \u2192 GraphTallyCollector.collect()     \u2192 PaymentsEscrow.collect() \u2192 GraphPayments.collect()     \u2192 distributes: protocol tax \u2192 data service cut \u2192 delegator cut \u2192 provider"},"deregister(address,bytes)":{"notice":"Deregister as an RPC provider."},"feesProvisionTracker(address)":{"notice":"The amount of tokens locked in stake claims for each service provider"},"getDelegationRatio()":{"notice":"External getter for the delegation ratio"},"getProvisionTokensRange()":{"notice":"External getter for the provision tokens range"},"getThawingPeriodRange()":{"notice":"External getter for the thawing period range"},"getVerifierCutRange()":{"notice":"External getter for the verifier cut range"},"pause()":{"notice":"Pauses the data service."},"pauseGuardians(address)":{"notice":"List of pause guardians and their allowed status"},"paymentsDestination(address)":{"notice":"Address that receives collected GRT for each provider."},"register(address,bytes)":{"notice":"Register as an RPC provider."},"registeredProviders(address)":{"notice":"Whether a provider has registered with this service."},"releaseStake(uint256)":{"notice":"Releases expired stake claims for the caller."},"removeChain(uint256)":{"notice":"Remove a chain from the supported set. Existing registrations are unaffected         until providers call stopService."},"setDefaultMinProvision(uint256)":{"notice":"Update the default minimum provision tokens."},"setMinThawingPeriod(uint64)":{"notice":"Update the minimum thawing period."},"setPaymentsDestination(address)":{"notice":"Update the address that receives collected GRT fees."},"slash(address,bytes)":{"notice":"Submit a Tier 1 fraud proof to slash a provider. Phase 1: NOT implemented. Tier 1 disputes require Merkle proof verification (EIP-1186 eth_getProof) against a trusted block header. Will be implemented in Phase 2 once the block header trust service is in place."},"startService(address,bytes)":{"notice":"Activate RPC service for a specific chain and capability tier."},"stopService(address,bytes)":{"notice":"Deactivate RPC service for a specific chain and tier."},"supportedChains(uint256)":{"notice":"Per-chain configuration (governance-controlled allowlist)."},"unpause()":{"notice":"Unpauses the data service."}},"notice":"Decentralised JSON-RPC data service built on The Graph Protocol's Horizon framework. Providers (indexers) stake GRT via HorizonStaking provisions, register here, then call startService for each (chainId, tier) pair they wish to serve. Gateways pay per-request via GraphTally (TAP v2); providers collect fees by submitting signed RAVs to collect(). Verification tiers (from RFC):   Tier 1 \u2014 Merkle-provable methods: fraud proof slashing (Phase 2).   Tier 2 \u2014 Quorum-verifiable: multi-provider cross-reference, no slashing.   Tier 3 \u2014 Non-deterministic: reputation scoring acceptProvisionPendingParameters(address.details: Two-step process: provider calls HorizonStaking.setProvisionParameters,      then this function accepts the queued change.

params.minProvisionTokens: Minimum GRT stake required. Pass 0 to use the protocol default.

returns.fees: Total GRT collected by the service provider.

params.pauseGuardian: Address authorised to pause the service in an emergency.

deregister(address,bytes).details: All chain registrations must be stopped first.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pause().details: Note that only functions using the modifiers `whenNotPaused` and `whenPaused` will be affected by the pause. Requirements: - The contract must not be already paused

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

releaseStake(uint256).details: This function is only meant to be called if the service provider has enough stake claims that releasing them all at once would exceed the block gas limit.This function can be overriden and/or disabled.Emits a {StakeClaimsReleased} event, and a {StakeClaimReleased} event for each claim released.

params.numClaimsToRelease: Amount of stake claims to process. If 0, all stake claims are processed.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setPaymentsDestination(address).details: Defaults to serviceProvider at registration. Allows separation of      operator key (used for signing) from payment wallet (cold storage etc.).      Takes effect on the next collect() call.

slash(address,bytes).details: data would be ABI-encoded (request, signedResponse, merkleProof, blockHeader).

params.data: ABI-encoded (uint64 chainId, uint8 tier, string endpoint).

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

unpause().details: Note that only functions using the modifiers `whenNotPaused` and `whenPaused` will be affected by the pause. Requirements: - The contract must be paused

DEFAULT_MIN_PROVISION().notice: Default minimum GRT provision per chain. Lower than SubgraphService (100k) — RPC proxying has lower infrastructure complexity (no Graph Node, no subgraph compilation).

MIN_THAWING_PERIOD().notice: Minimum thawing period. Shorter than SubgraphService (28d) because RPC correctness disputes resolve faster than subgraph POI verification.

STAKE_TO_FEES_RATIO().notice: Stake locked per GRT of fees collected. Matches SubgraphService.

acceptProvisionPendingParameters(address.notice: Accept pending changes to this provider's provision parameters.

addChain(uint256,uint256).notice: Add a chain to the supported set.

claims(bytes32).notice: List of all locked stake claims to be released to service providers

claimsLists(address).notice: Service providers registered in the data service

collect(address,uint8,bytes).notice: Collect fees by submitting a signed Receipt Aggregate Voucher (RAV). Flow:   RPCDataService.collect() → GraphTallyCollector.collect()     → PaymentsEscrow.collect() → GraphPayments.collect()     → distributes: protocol tax → data service cut → delegator cut → provider

feesProvisionTracker(address).notice: The amount of tokens locked in stake claims for each service provider

getDelegationRatio().notice: External getter for the delegation ratio

getProvisionTokensRange().notice: External getter for the provision tokens range

getThawingPeriodRange().notice: External getter for the thawing period range

getVerifierCutRange().notice: External getter for the verifier cut range

pauseGuardians(address).notice: List of pause guardians and their allowed status

paymentsDestination(address).notice: Address that receives collected GRT for each provider.

registeredProviders(address).notice: Whether a provider has registered with this service.

releaseStake(uint256).notice: Releases expired stake claims for the caller.

removeChain(uint256).notice: Remove a chain from the supported set. Existing registrations are unaffected         until providers call stopService.

setDefaultMinProvision(uint256).notice: Update the default minimum provision tokens.

setPaymentsDestination(address).notice: Update the address that receives collected GRT fees.

slash(address,bytes).notice: Submit a Tier 1 fraud proof to slash a provider. Phase 1: NOT implemented. Tier 1 disputes require Merkle proof verification (EIP-1186 eth_getProof) against a trusted block header. Will be implemented in Phase 2 once the block header trust service is in place.

startService(address,bytes).notice: Activate RPC service for a specific chain and capability tier.

stopService(address,bytes).notice: Deactivate RPC service for a specific chain and tier.
